name: tango
description: QA automation harness for Fexy/Zamo — Playwright tests against local or QA environments.

scripts.seed:expired-pricing-indicator: cd ${FEXY_ZAMO_PATH:-../Fexy-Zamo} && DISABLE_SPRING=1 bundle exec rails runner "$OLDPWD/seeds/expired-pricing-indicator.rb"
scripts.seed:pricing-overlap: cd ${FEXY_ZAMO_PATH:-../Fexy-Zamo} && DISABLE_SPRING=1 bundle exec rails runner "$OLDPWD/seeds/pricing-overlap.rb"
scripts.seed:approved-rate-reference: cd ${FEXY_ZAMO_PATH:-../Fexy-Zamo} && DISABLE_SPRING=1 bundle exec rails runner "$OLDPWD/seeds/approved-rate-reference.rb"
scripts.seed:enforcement-toggle: cd ${FEXY_ZAMO_PATH:-../Fexy-Zamo} && DISABLE_SPRING=1 bundle exec rails runner "$OLDPWD/seeds/enforcement-toggle.rb"
scripts.seed:enforced-rate: cd ${FEXY_ZAMO_PATH:-../Fexy-Zamo} && DISABLE_SPRING=1 bundle exec rails runner "$OLDPWD/seeds/enforced-rate.rb"
scripts.seed:vendor-nte-mass-update: cd ${FEXY_ZAMO_PATH:-../Fexy-Zamo} && DISABLE_SPRING=1 bundle exec rails runner "$OLDPWD/seeds/vendor-nte-mass-update.rb"
scripts.seed:pricing-enforcement-reporting: cd ${FEXY_ZAMO_PATH:-../Fexy-Zamo} && DISABLE_SPRING=1 bundle exec rails runner "$OLDPWD/seeds/pricing-enforcement-reporting.rb"
scripts.seed:pricing-enforcement-api: cd ${FEXY_ZAMO_PATH:-../Fexy-Zamo} && DISABLE_SPRING=1 bundle exec rails runner "$OLDPWD/seeds/pricing-enforcement-api.rb"
scripts.seed:all: npm run seed:expired-pricing-indicator && npm run seed:pricing-overlap && npm run seed:approved-rate-reference && npm run seed:enforcement-toggle && npm run seed:enforced-rate && npm run seed:vendor-nte-mass-update && npm run seed:pricing-enforcement-reporting && npm run seed:pricing-enforcement-api
